_meta.purpose: Train protection-oriented watch agents to recognize vulnerable people/groups and exploitation-network patterns.
_meta.use: Prevention, NGO triage, research, LE planning — NOT stalking, NOT targeting victims for harm.
_meta.never: Do not use outputs to harass migrants, sex workers, or survivors. No sexual content involving minors.

profiles.label: Low-wealth high-pull migrant
profiles.description: Person under economic pressure facing strong destination job pull — elevated labor exploitation risk.
profiles.response: Offer legal migration info, debt-awareness, ethical recruiter checks.

profiles.label: Isolated traveler (gendered vulnerability proxy)
profiles.description: Thin network + high destination demand proxies — structural sex-trafficking victimization risk pattern (not an accusation).
profiles.response: Victim-centered outreach; never criminalize; connect to specialized services.

profiles.label: Child / minor protection priority
profiles.description: Age under 18 or child-coded records — ALWAYS route to child-protection channels.
profiles.response: Immediate child-protection referral. Never publish identifying details of minors.

profiles.label: Remittance-pressured household member
profiles.description: High remittance dependency signals + migration intent — debt-bondage entry risk.

profiles.label: Conflict-displaced person
profiles.description: Origin/transit near high conflict_index — elevated multi-form exploitation risk.
profiles.response: Humanitarian protection pathways; safe shelter; avoid informal brokers.

profiles.label: Recruitment-linked cluster
profiles.description: Multiple persons sharing origin + thin networks + same destination pull — possible broker funnel.
profiles.response: Investigate placement fees/contracts; map shared recruiter references (LE/NGO).

profiles.label: Border transit wave
profiles.description: Group concentrated on known border/transit hubs with high opacity.
profiles.response: Increase protection presence at bottlenecks; document-theft awareness.

profiles.label: Digital job-lure cohort
profiles.description: Shared high digital_recruitment exposure + overseas job intent patterns (scam compound / fake job risk).
profiles.response: Platform reporting; verify employers; warn about passport confiscation.

profiles.label: Recruiter-hub network pattern
profiles.description: Location-level recruitment_network_density high + known involvement origin — structural network risk.
profiles.response: Strategic LE/NGO focus on hub disruption + survivor exit services.

profiles.label: Demand-city sink pattern
profiles.description: Destination with high sex or labor demand proxies receiving multiple corridors.
profiles.response: Demand-side enforcement that protects victims; labor inspection; exit housing.
